free_text: Reaction mechanisms in 16O+40Ca at an incident
measurements of alpha and proton spectra
14UD Pelletron facility of the Nuclear Science
Self-supporting Ca target of thickness 5 mg/cm2.
Target was kept in kerosene and was vacuum transported
into the target ladder of the pose scattering chamber.
Two detector telescopes ( E-dE) were set
up using solid state Si detectors
based data acquisition system were used in the
Standard electronics and a Computer Automated
acquisition system were used in the experiment.
